title: AI Workflow Consultant for Adobe Premiere and Claude Video Automation System
brief: I am looking to hire a one on one AI workflow consultant or coach to help me build an AI assisted video editing workflow for Adobe Premiere Pro. I own a personal training business and have a library of over 5,000 exercises that I want to turn into short educational exercise reference videos for both coach education and client support. Currently, each video takes me approximately 20 to 30 minutes to produce manually in Adobe Premiere. My goal is to reduce that production time significantly through AI assisted workflows, ideally down to 5 to 10 minutes or less per video. I am specifically looking for someone who can coach me on how to properly use Claude, Claude CoWork, or another AI system that can assist with creative workflows and repetitive video editing tasks. I am NOT looking for a generic AI course or prompt engineering tutorial. I am looking for someone who can work directly with me to help architect and refine a repeatable production pipeline. Some examples of the workflow goals include: • Automated or semi automated subtitle generation • Default transition systems and reusable editing templates • Branding overlays, watermarks, footers, and promotional elements • Arrows, highlights, or callouts pointing to muscle groups or movement patterns • Assistance organizing clips, naming conventions, and metadata • AI assisted scripting or exercise cue generation • Building reusable prompt systems and project instructions • Creating a scalable workflow that can eventually proces
